role: Reformist politician; former Deputy Interior Minister
bio: Mostafa Tajzadeh is a prominent reformist politician and member of the [Mojahedin of the Islamic Revolution Organization](/orgs/mojahedin-of-islamic-revolution-organization). He served as deputy interior minister under [President Mohammad Khatami](/people/mohammad-khatami). He was arrested after the 2009 [Green Movement](/events/green-movement-protests-2009) protests and sentenced to six years in prison. He attempted to run for president in 2021 but was disqualified by the [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council). He was re-arrested in 2022 during the Mahsa Amini protests.
editorial_notes: Imprisoned multiple times. Disqualified from 2021 presidential election.
